document_metadata.title: Alien: Isolation Blueprint and Collectibles Guide
document_metadata.author: Raycon
document_metadata.description: Complete reference guide for all 21 crafting blueprints (7 item types at 3 upgrade tiers), all 10 Nostromo Logs, ID Tag distribution by mission, crafting material types and strategy, and achievement/trophy requirements.
sections_covered: Blueprints — All 21 (Medkit, EMP Mine, Noisemaker, Smoke Bomb, Flashbang, Pipe Bomb, Molotov)
Nostromo Logs — All 10 with location and tool requirements
ID Tags — Distribution by mission and backtrack locations
